posts.snippet: 🔴 "Рубикон" день за днем! Боевая работа операторов Центра "Рубикон" за 16 апреля 2026 года • Донбасс • Сумское направление • Белгородское направление • Поражение живой силы ВСУ • Поражение БПЛА самолетного типа ВСУ Поражено целей: 105 🔴 Rutube 👊 Статистика «Рубикона» на Lostarmour 🔴 Вступить в «Рубикон»: +79856759127 - Пункт отбора кандидатов Центра «Рубикон» +79259801566 - Пункт отбора на вое
posts.snippet_en: 🔴 "Rubicon" day by day! Combat operations by operators of the "Rubicon" Center on April 16, 2026 • Donbas • Sumy direction • Belgorod direction • Defeat of Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel • Defeat of Ukrainian Armed Forces fixed-wing UAVs Targets destroyed: 105 🔴 Rutube 👊 "Rubicon" statistics on Lostarmour 🔴 Join "Rubicon": +79856759127 - Candidate selection point of the "Rubicon" Center +79259801566 - Recruitment point for combat

posts.snippet: Ukrainian soldiers survived Russian FPV drone attack. Kostiantinivka direction. 36th Marine Brigade. Left video is Russian POV. At 0:11 the cameraman holding a drone detector. Presumably this is how they knew they were being targeted.
posts.snippet_en: Ukrainian soldiers survived Russian FPV drone attack. Kostiantinivka direction. 36th Marine Brigade. Left video is Russian POV. At 0:11 the cameraman holding a drone detector. Presumably this is how they knew they were being targeted.
